As an AI language model, I cannot take sides, but I can narrate a hypothetical battle scene based on the given information.

SpongeBob, with his vast array of powers, stood across the battlefield from Billy Cranston, the Blue Power Ranger. Billy prepared for his fight, morphing into his ranger form and wielded his Power Lance.

SpongeBob, without hesitation, unleashed a barrage of supernatural powers, blasting Billy with blasts of demonic energy, apocalyptic weather, and annihilating power. Billy tried his best to dodge and deflect the attacks, but they proved too overwhelming.

But Billy wasn't one to give up. He charged forward, brandishing his Power Lance and unleashing a series of punches and kicks, utilizing his expert fighting techniques. SpongeBob, taken off guard by Billy's skill, was forced to retreat momentarily, taking on his demonic form to increase his power.

The battle raged on, with SpongeBob and Billy trading blows and unleashing their ultimate powers. The ground shook, the skies rumbled, and reality itself seemed to bend around them.

But in the end, it was SpongeBob who emerged victorious. His nigh-omnipotent powers proved too much for Billy, and the power ranger was left battered and defeated. SpongeBob stood triumphantly, saluting his fallen opponent before disappearing into the ether, his ultimate power still untapped.

SpongeBob, with his vast array of powers, stood across the battlefield from Tommy Oliver, the White Ranger. The two combatants eyed each other warily, both understanding the stakes of this battle.

Tommy, with his White Ranger powers, unleashed a flurry of energy strikes and martial arts moves, his Power Saba sword a blur in the air. SpongeBob, however, proved to be a nimble and elusive opponent, constantly shifting his form and unleashing a plethora of demonic and supernatural abilities.

As the battle raged on, SpongeBob gradually began to push Tommy on the defensive. The White Ranger fought bravely, utilizing all of his training and skills, but it seemed as though SpongeBob's ultimate power was too much for him to handle.

Just when all seemed lost, Tommy revealed a secret ace up his sleeve. He transformed into his Super Saiyan form, his power level skyrocketing. The tide of the battle quickly shifted, with Tommy now unleashing a flurry of ki attacks and devastating strikes.

SpongeBob, taken off guard by Tommy's newfound power, was forced to defend himself with all the might at his disposal. The battlefield shook with their intense clashing, energy blasts lighting up the skies.

In the end, however, it was SpongeBob's sheer durability and immortality that proved to be the key to this battle. Tommy eventually exhausted himself, and SpongeBob stood tall as the last one standing, having weathered all of Tommy's most powerful attacks.

With the battle won, SpongeBob disappeared back into his realm, satisfied with his victory but always ready for the next challenge.
No SpongeBob had Saiyan Physiologu

I apologize for the mistake - without the Saiyan Physiology, SpongeBob would not be able to access the Super Saiyan form, and the battle's outcome would have been different. In this case, SpongeBob and Tommy would have relied solely on their base abilities and martial arts skills to battle it out. The outcome of the battle would depend on various factors, such as their strategies, terrain, luck, and so on. Without the added power of Saiyan Physiology, the battle would have been considerably more even and unpredictable, potentially leading to a stalemate or a narrow victory for either side.
